editor.companyHelp: Organisation name is set by your organisation
editor.cropDescription: Drag to reposition, pinch or use slider to zoom

card.onlySharedNeverSold: Information is only shared with those you choose. Never sold.
card.qrSavedDetailsDesc: This code includes your saved Swiish details and a link to your card when scanned with an online device.
card.qrLinkOnlyOffline: Link-only QR is available when you're online.
card.qrSwitchToFull: Switch to "Full details" to use your saved offline code.
card.qrConnectOnce: Connect once to generate and save your QR code for offline use.
card.qrOfflineNote: Using last saved QR details (offline). The code includes your contact info and a link to your Swiish card.
card.qrErrorSimple: Unable to load link-only QR right now. Please try again in a moment.
card.qrErrorRich: Unable to load full-details QR right now. Your last saved details are still available offline.
card.whatsappTemplate: Hi, we met via your Swiish card. My name is ... and my number/email is ...
card.emailBodyTemplate:
Hi, we met via your Swiish card.
My name is ...
My phone number is ...
My email address is ...
card.installFailedMsg: Install prompt failed. Please use your browser menu to install: Chrome/Edge (three dots menu > Install app), Firefox (menu > Install), or Safari (Share > Add to Home Screen).
card.alreadyInstalledMsg: This app is already installed on your device.
card.installChrome: Chrome/Edge: Click the three dots menu (⋮) in the address bar, then select "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen".
card.installFirefox: Firefox: Click the menu button, then select "Install" or "Add to Home Screen".
card.installSafari: Safari (iOS): Tap the Share button, then "Add to Home Screen".
card.installGeneric: Open your browser menu and look for "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen" option.
card.installNote: Note: The install button may not be available if the app doesn't meet PWA requirements (service worker, valid manifest, etc.).

settings.defaultLanguageHelp: Default language for new users and email templates
settings.allowCustomLinks: Allow users to add custom links

settings.allowThemeColors: Allow users to choose theme colors
settings.allowThemeColorsFull: Allow users to choose theme colors from the palette
settings.whenEnabledLinks: When enabled, users can add custom links to their cards. When disabled, the links section will be locked.
settings.whenEnabledPrivacy: When enabled, users can modify privacy options (require interaction, obfuscation, block robots). When disabled, privacy settings will be locked to organisation defaults.
settings.whenEnabledImages: When enabled, users can upload their own images. When disabled, image uploads will be blocked.
settings.profileColorsOrg: Color palette available to this organisation's cards
settings.userCustomisationDescription: Control what organisation users can customise on their cards
settings.allowImageUploads: Allow users to upload custom images
settings.appThemesDescription: Choose the visual theme for your organisation
settings.imageCustomisationDescription: Control whether users can upload custom images
settings.linksCustomisationDescription: Control whether users can add custom links
settings.organisationNameDescription: The name shown across your organisation's cards
settings.privacySettingsDescription: Control whether users can modify privacy settings
settings.profileColorsDescription: Define the color palette available to cards in your organisation
settings.themeCustomisationDescription: Control whether users can choose custom theme colors
settings.whenEnabledCustomLinks: When enabled, users can add custom links to their cards. When disabled, the links section will be locked.
settings.whenEnabledImageUploads: When enabled, users can upload their own images. When disabled, image uploads will be blocked.
settings.whenEnabledPrivacySettings: When enabled, users can modify privacy options (require interaction, obfuscation, block robots). When disabled, privacy settings will be locked to organisation defaults.
settings.whenEnabledThemeColors: When enabled, users can choose theme colors from the palette. When disabled, the theme colors section will be locked.
settings.themeSwiishDesc: Original Swiish theme with colors and textures.
settings.themeMinimalDesc: Black/white, few grays, no textures, border-only accents.

invitation.welcomeCreated: Welcome! Your account has been created.
invitation.notFoundOrExpired: Invitation not found or has expired
invitation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
invitation.invitedAsRole: You've been invited to join as a {{role}}

errors.pleaseEnterValidUrl: Please enter a valid user URL (e.g., "sarah")
errors.userUrlMinLength: User URL must be at least 1 character long
errors.userUrlExistsMessage: A card with user URL "{{slug}}" already exists. Please choose another user URL.
errors.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.emailAlreadyInUseMessage: Another card already uses this email address ({{email}}). Would you like to save anyway?
errors.errorCreatingUser: Error creating user. Please try again.
errors.invitationSentEmailFailed: Invitation created but email failed to send. You can retry from the invitations list below.
errors.mustHaveOneColor: You must have at least one color
errors.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Only images are allowed.
errors.fileExtensionMismatch: File extension does not match file type
errors.shortCodeInvalidLength: Short code must be exactly 7 characters
errors.shortCodeInvalidFormat: Short code must contain only letters and numbers
errors.cannotCreateCardOutsideOrg: Cannot create card for user outside your organization
errors.userAlreadyExists: User with this email already exists
errors.cannotRemoveLastOwner: Cannot remove last owner from organization
errors.cannotDeleteLastOwner: Cannot delete last owner from organization
errors.invitationExpiredRecreate: Invitation has expired. Please delete and create a new one.
errors.resetTokenAlreadyUsed: This reset token has already been used
errors.verificationEmailAlreadySent: Verification email already sent. Please check your email or wait before requesting another.
errors.cannotDeleteOrgWithPlatformAdmin: Cannot delete an organisation that contains a platform admin
errors.activeInvitationAlreadyExists: Active invitation already exists for this email
errors.activeInvitationWaitOrDelete: An active invitation already exists for this email. Please wait for the user to accept the invitation or delete it first.
errors.userUrlTooShort: User URL must be at least 1 character long

validation.organisationNameRequired: Organisation name is required and must be less than 200 characters
validation.passwordMinimumLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.slugInvalidCharacters: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
validation.slugLengthRequired: Slug must be between 1 and 50 characters
validation.identifierInvalidCharacters: Identifier must contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens
validation.identifierLengthRequired: Identifier must be between 1 and 50 characters
validation.roleOwnerOrMember: Role must be owner or member
validation.themeColorsMustBeArray: Theme colors must be an array
validation.payloadMustBeString: payload must be a string up to 5000 characters

rateLimiting.tooManyLoginAttempts: Too many login attempts, please try again later.
rateLimiting.tooManyUploadAttempts: Too many upload attempts, please try again later.
rateLimiting.tooManyRequests: Too many requests from this IP, please try again later.
rateLimiting.tooManyShortCodeLookups: Too many short code lookup attempts

success.passwordResetInitiated: If an account exists with this email, a password reset link has been sent
success.accountCreated: Welcome! Your account has been created.

privacy.requireInteractionHelp: Requires users to click a button to reveal email and phone. Prevents basic bots from seeing contact info in the initial page load.
privacy.clientSideObfuscationHelp: Encodes email and phone in the HTML to make scraping harder. Note: Determined scrapers can still decode this.
privacy.blockRobotsHelp: Adds meta robots tag to prevent search engines from indexing this card.

modals.whatWouldYouLikeToDo: What would you like to do?
modals.enterUserUrl: Enter a user URL for the new card (e.g., 'sarah'):
modals.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{userEmail}}? This will delete the user and all their cards. This action cannot be undone.
modals.deleteCardConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{slug}}?
modals.deleteOrganisationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete organisation "{{orgName}}"? This will delete all users, cards, and data for this organisation. This action cannot be undone.
modals.deleteColorConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the color "{{name}}"?
modals.deleteInvitationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation?
modals.emailInUseConfirm: Another card already uses this email address ({{email}}). Would you like to save anyway?
modals.deleteOrgConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete organisation "{{name}}"? This will delete all users, cards, and data for this organisation. This action cannot be undone.

emptyStates.noCardYet: You don't have a card yet
emptyStates.createFirstCard: Create your first card to get started.
emptyStates.disabledCustomLinks: Your organisation has disabled custom links. Contact your administrator to enable this feature.
emptyStates.disabledImageUploads: Your organisation has disabled custom image uploads. Contact your administrator to enable this feature.
emptyStates.disabledPrivacySettings: Your organisation has disabled privacy settings customisation. Privacy settings are controlled by your organisation.
emptyStates.disabledThemeColors: Your organisation has disabled theme colour customisation. Your card will use the default theme colour.
emptyStates.disabledImages: Your organisation has disabled custom image uploads. Contact your administrator to enable this feature.

emptyStates.disabledPrivacy: Your organisation has disabled privacy settings customisation. Privacy settings are controlled by your organisation.
emptyStates.disabledTheme: Your organisation has disabled theme colour customisation. Your card will use the default theme colour.

colors.noColorsDefined: No colors defined. Add a color to get started.
colors.mustHaveAtLeastOne: You must have at least one color
colors.leaveBlankAuto: Leave blank to use auto (complementary) color

version.youAreOnLatest: You are on the latest release
version.unreleasedVersion: You are on an unreleased development version - things may break
version.unreleasedDev: You are on an unreleased development version - things may break

invitation.subject: Invitation to join {{organizationName}} on Swiish
invitation.heading: You've been invited to join {{organizationName}}
invitation.introText: You've been invited to join {{organizationName}} on Swiish. Click the link below to accept the invitation and create your account.
invitation.expiryNote: This invitation will expire in 7 days.
invitation.ignoreNote: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.
invitation.plainTextIntro: You've been invited to join {{organizationName}} on Swiish. Visit {{invitationUrl}} to accept the invitation. This invitation expires in 7 days.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your Swiish password
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset Request
passwordReset.introText: You requested to reset your password for your Swiish account. Click the link below to reset your password:
passwordReset.expiryNote: This link will expire in 1 hour.
passwordReset.ignoreNote: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.plainTextIntro: You requested to reset your password. Visit {{resetUrl}} to reset it. This link expires in 1 hour.

verification.subject: Verify your Swiish email address
verification.heading: Verify Your Email Address
verification.introText: Please verify your email address by clicking the link below:
verification.expiryNote: This link will expire in 7 days.
verification.ignoreNote: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
verification.plainTextIntro: Please verify your email address by visiting {{verifyUrl}}. This link expires in 7 days.
